name: invocation_id
description: Unique ID for the entire DQ job run. All rule bindings from one Dataplex task execution share the same invocation_id.

name: execution_ts
description: Timestamp when the DQ job ran. Use DATE(execution_ts) to filter results by day.

name: rule_binding_id
description: The rule binding ID as defined in the YAML file. e.g. EMP__STAGING__EMPLOYEE_ID__NOT_NULL

name: rule_id
description: The rule name as defined in the YAML rules section. e.g. NOT_NULL, REGEX_EMPLOYEE_ID_FORMAT

name: table_id
description: Fully qualified BigQuery table that was checked. e.g. project-a.employee_staging.employee_details

name: column_id
description: Column name that the rule was applied to. e.g. employee_id, work_email, absence_type

name: dimension
description: Data quality dimension. One of: completeness, validity, conformance, uniqueness, consistency, integrity, timeliness

name: rows_validated
description: Total number of rows scanned after the row_filter was applied.

name: success_count
description: Number of rows that passed the rule.

name: failed_count
description: Number of rows that failed the rule.

name: null_count
description: Number of NULL values found in the column being checked.

name: success_percentage
description: Percentage of rows that passed. Calculated as (success_count / rows_validated) * 100. Primary metric used for threshold evaluation.

name: failed_percentage
description: Percentage of rows that failed. Calculated as (failed_count / rows_validated) * 100.

name: null_percentage
description: Percentage of NULL values. Calculated as (null_count / rows_validated) * 100.

name: last_modified
description: Timestamp when this row was last written or updated by CloudDQ.

name: metadata_json_string
description: JSON string containing additional metadata from the YAML rule definition such as params and filter expressions.

name: dataplex_lake
description: Dataplex lake ID under which the DQ task ran. e.g. ltc-data-lake

name: dataplex_zone
description: Dataplex zone ID under which the DQ task ran. e.g. raw-zone

name: dataplex_asset_id
description: Dataplex asset ID if the source table is registered as a Dataplex asset. Null if not registered.

name: dq_run_id
description: Internal CloudDQ run identifier. Used for debugging and tracing a specific execution within Dataplex.
